VAL-CROSS-001.name: New User Registration Flow
VAL-CROSS-001.summary: Complete new user registration flow verified: setup password -> register -> login -> onboarding -> home. All validation failures tested.

VAL-CROSS-002.name: Returning User Login Flow
VAL-CROSS-002.summary: Returning user login flow verified: unlock -> login -> home with profile. Session expiry and corrupted profile handling tested.

VAL-CROSS-003.name: Complete Session Flow
VAL-CROSS-003.summary: Complete meditation session flow verified: intro -> active -> concluded -> history. Session immutability and error handling tested.

VAL-CROSS-004.name: View Session History Flow
VAL-CROSS-004.summary: Session history viewing flow verified: history list -> session detail -> back. Empty state and pagination tested.

VAL-CROSS-005.name: Edit Profile Flow
VAL-CROSS-005.summary: Profile edit flow verified: load pre-filled -> edit -> save -> home. Validation failures and network error handling tested.

VAL-CROSS-006.name: Change Settings Flow
VAL-CROSS-006.summary: Settings change flow verified: TTS/STT/AI model changes with auto-save. Rapid changes, invalid values, and persistence tested.

VAL-CROSS-007.name: Logout Flow
VAL-CROSS-007.summary: Logout flow verified from all pages: home, history, settings, profile. Immediate re-login and token invalidation tested.

blockers.issue: Flet CanvasKit limitation prevents browser automation
blockers.description: Flet's CanvasKit web renderer doesn't expose DOM elements for agent-browser/playwright interaction. UI tests use component-level mocking instead.
blockers.impact: Cross-flow assertions verified via API-level tests rather than browser-based E2E

note: Tests use component-level testing with mocks per user-testing.md guidance for Flet apps
